subject: ASAP: .NET Developer – .NET – Healthcare
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the healthcare sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a senior .NET Developer with strong experience in .NET. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:

  • .NET
  • BigQuery
  • RabbitMQ

Details:
Client: VitalisIT
Start: ASAP
Duration: 12 months
Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
Rate: up to 1000 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Oscar Lindgren
Senior Consultant Manager
Staffbridge Nordic
Tel: +46 73 233 45 67
